name: Pimento-Onion Relish
recipeIngredient: 1 medium Vidalia onion, thinly sliced (about 1 cup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine vinegar, fine herbs, sugar, and water in a bowl.
2. Add the pimentos and onion; mix well.
3. Marinate overnight at room temperature.
4. Drain excess liquid before serving with meat.
